Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Requires NYCHA to provide information and trainings to residents regarding resident management corporations
Summary: Requires NYCHA to provide information and trainings to all residents regarding the formation of resident management corporations, the requirements of such resident management corporations and the potential benefits of creating such resident management corporations.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public housing law, in relation to providing trainings and information to residents regarding resident management corporations
